programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne and the rest of the family try to cheer Van up after a knee injury ends his arena-football career; Van receives a payout from the team but begins to blow the money on gifts for the family.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba learns that Van has hired a nanny so that he can spend more time goofing off and doing all the things he didn't do before.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean confesses that she has a big crush on her new marriage counselor, and she asks Reba to help her fire him.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba decides to pursue a career in real estate, and Brock reluctantly allows her to handle the sale of his condo.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Deprived of Van's attention, Cheyenne develops a relationship with the father of her daughter's play date.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: A small town's radio station manager meets her match when a visiting businessman can't seem to see beyond the screen of his laptop computer. Everything changes when she ropes him into participating in her bachelor bake-off to help save the station.

programme.title: Flip That Romance
programme.desc: As spring blooms, rival house flippers find themselves renovating dual sides of a duplex. As they attempt to out-do each other every step of the way, the stakes of the renovation escalate and an old romance is rekindled.

programme.title: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A Los Angeles event coordinator learns that her estranged uncle has recently passed away and left her a chalet in Vail, Colo.

programme.title: It Was Always You
programme.desc: A woman's engagement plans get thrown into disarray when her fiance's free-spirited brother returns home.

programme.title: A Picture of Her
programme.desc: After becoming the subject of an award-winning magazine cover, a woman embarks on a quest to uncover the true identity of the photographer who snapped her photo.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Lt. Callie Jackson returns home after a military tour to find her late grandfather's barbecue joint is struggling, but she has a run-in with a TV director who teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of looking back.

programme.title: I'll Be Seeing You
programme.desc: When a work errand derails Amy's weekend plans with her grandma, they embark on a road trip with one sentimental detour but need the help of a charming activities director.

programme.title: A Little Park Music
programme.desc: When a piano appears in the park gazebo, interfering with important work, city manager Allie joins forces with rookie cop Ryan to remove it, only to find both music and love are hard to resist. Stars Laci J Mailey, Beau Mirchoff.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche, Dorothy and Sophia cheer up a hospitalized Rose after she becomes ill at a crashed class reunion.

programme.title: The Golden Girls

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie cooks lime-marinated chicken; Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit at Scott's BBQ; in these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the South.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Wes David travels the lakes and rivers of North America on a range of fishing adventures; in the process, he teaches anglers of varying levels of experience how to get the most out of their time on the water.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's fast and frenzied fishing action for some of North America's most prodigious sportfish as the In-Fisherman staff takes you for mauling and brawling muskies; heading to one of North America's finest waters for giant smallmouth bass; taking you into the Alaskan wilderness to reveal the nature of record-class northern pike, including a 54-inch monster that's the biggest pike ever captured in alm

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Korey Sprengel tours Green Bay while casting small glide baits for large Perch.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Profile of Frank Moore, a lifelong fisherman from Umpqua, Ore.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Follow along as Larry and his clients get an early start on the Wolf River walleye bite!

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson prove not all fall crappies head for deep basins. Hair jigs in the weeds produce big slabs.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Across two full segments, Jon pursues early summer monsters - trophy-class fish that test tackle and tactics alike. From dialing in weather patterns to adapting presentations as the day evolves, Jon breaks down the mindset and mechanics behind consistently finding and landing giants on northern waters.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Fishing tips and tricks and competitive angling action.

programme.desc: Elite pro Bryan New joins us for exciting fall fishing on Oklahoma's Lake Tenkiller.
